cards.name: Gondorian Archers
cards.quote: With eyes as sharp as their arrows, they guard the realm.

cards.name: Gondorian Infantry
cards.quote: Steadfast and true, they stand like stone against the tide.

cards.name: Knights Of Dol Amroth
cards.quote: Horns of the sea call us; we ride to glory.

cards.name: Meduseld Guards
cards.quote: We are the shield of the Golden Hall, unyielding as the mountains.

cards.name: Pelargir Fleet
cards.quote: Through stormy seas, our sails are the harbingers of hope.

cards.name: Rangers Of Ithilien
cards.quote: Unseen, we tread the paths of shadow and light.

cards.name: Riders Of Rohan
cards.quote: The thunder of our horses shall echo in victory.

cards.name: Tower Guards
cards.quote: Our vigilance is the fortress, our valor the blade.

cards.name: White Tower Wardens
cards.quote: Guardians of the White City, we defend against the dark.

cards.name: Trebuchets
cards.quote: With every stone cast, we hurl defiance at our foes.

cards.name: Woses
cards.quote: We are the whispers of the forest, fierce in our silence.

cards.name: Minas Tirith
cards.quote: Minas Tirith rises white against the long shadow of the East, steadfast as a horn-call at dawn.

cards.name: Henneth Annun
cards.quote: Henneth Annun hides the stream in shadow, as though the land itself guarded the hidden door.

cards.name: Ithilien
cards.quote: In the soft glow of dusk, the woods hide a thousand secrets.

cards.name: NorthernGondor
cards.quote: Where the mountains meet the sky, ancient tales linger.

cards.name: SouthernGondor
cards.quote: The sun sets over golden fields, a land of dreams.

cards.name: CairAndros
cards.quote: CairAndros holds the river like a spear-point, watching north and south with hard patience.

cards.name: DolAmroth
cards.quote: DolAmroth shines like a white helm set upon the sea, bright against the long road of dusk.

cards.name: Erech
cards.quote: Erech remembers the oath-stones, and even the wind there speaks with old restraint.

cards.name: Imdorad
cards.quote: Imdorad feels like a hall built for men who kept faith when the world forgot them.

cards.name: Linhir
cards.quote: Linhir keeps its harbor face to the tides, with Gondor’s old courage under the salt air.

cards.name: MinasArthor
cards.quote: MinasArthor stands in stern splendor, and its towers hold the wind like a vow.

cards.name: Morthondost
cards.quote: Morthondost stands as if carved from the will of the men who would not yield the river-road.

cards.name: Osgiliath
cards.quote: Osgiliath bears its wounds openly, yet the river still remembers the city that once was.

cards.name: Pelargir
cards.quote: Pelargir wears the scars of trade and war alike, yet the tide still brings and carries its memory.

cards.name: Nindalf
cards.quote: In the quiet valley, the river sings a timeless song.

cards.name: Aragorn
cards.quote: Aragorn bears the hope of a line long hidden.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Hope <sprite name="hope"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Imrahil
cards.quote: Imrahil comes with the sea-wind and the last light of Dol Amroth.
cards.actionEffect: Upgrade fort <sprite name="fort"> on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Treebeard
cards.quote: Treebeard remembers the young world, and speaks slowly of it.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 3 hi <sprite name="hi"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Denethor
cards.quote: The line of kings is yet unbroken, but time is a thief.
cards.actionEffect: Increase loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 20 on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Faramir
cards.quote: I will not sacrifice the innocent for the sake of victory.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hexes in radius 3 around all controlled characters.

cards.name: Storm Warning from Pelargir
cards.quote: A tempest brews upon the waters; heed the warning.
cards.actionEffect: If this hex borders the sea, the current commander gains 1 Warship <sprite name="ws">.

cards.name: BlackSailsRumoured
cards.quote: Whispers of darkness spread like shadows on the sea.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the hexes of the nearest 3 enemy units at sea.

cards.name: Light the Watchfires
cards.quote: In the flickering flames, the unseen dangers reveal themselves.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal as scouted and seen all hexes in radius 2 of each PC you own for 1 turn.

cards.name: Beacon Fires of Anorien
cards.quote: One flame answers another, and the hills remember that Gondor still stands.
cards.actionEffect: The beacons are lit. Allied units here gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> and lose Fear <sprite name="fear">; enemies here are Halted <sprite name="halted">.

cards.name: White Tower Bastion
cards.quote: The white stone does not yield while the watch is kept.
cards.actionEffect: An owned PC at this hex gains +1 fortification.

cards.name: Pelargir War Galleys
cards.quote: The tide takes the ships out hard and brings them back stronger.
cards.actionEffect: A commander in an owned port gains 1 Warship <sprite name="ws">.

cards.name: Rammas Echor Catapults
cards.quote: Where the wall thunders, the road beyond grows quiet.

cards.name: Osgiliath Quartermasters
cards.quote: Ledgers and locks keep a city alive when the river runs red.
cards.actionEffect: The stone city still feeds the war. Choose 1 allied army commander in radius 2; its owner gains 1 <sprite name="timber">, 1 <sprite name="iron">, and 1 <sprite name="gold">, and that army gains 1 XP.

cards.name: White Tower Arsenal
cards.quote: Every spear in the storehouse is a promise against the dark.
cards.actionEffect: All allied army commanders here gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> and Shielded <sprite name="shielded">.

cards.name: Rammas Echor
cards.quote: The outer wall stands as a line drawn in dust and faith.
cards.actionEffect: All allied units here gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> and enemy units here are Halted <sprite name="halted">.

cards.name: Dol Amroth Shipyard
cards.quote: Hammers ring beside the tide, and each plank learns the shape of a warship.
cards.actionEffect: If this hex borders the sea, an allied army commander here gains 1 Warship <sprite name="ws"> and its owner gains 1 timber <sprite name="timber">.

cards.name: Gondor Mustering
cards.quote: He knows every drum-call of the city and every gate that must answer it.
cards.actionEffect: Choose 1 allied army commander in radius 2; it gains 1 Light Infantry <sprite name="li"> and Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Pelargir Ship Captain
cards.quote: He reads wind and harbor alike, and keeps the tide bound to the king's road.
cards.actionEffect: If this hex borders the sea, an allied army commander here gains 1 Warship <sprite name="ws"> and Haste <sprite name="haste"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Signal Fires of Anorien
cards.quote: One flame answers another, and the hills remember that Gondor still stands.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal 10 random mountain hexes as seen for 1 turn.

cards.name: Orders on the Pelennor
cards.quote: A sharp order can move a host faster than a trumpet.
cards.actionEffect: Choose 1 allied Human or Dunedain in radius 2; it becomes Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and may move again this turn.

cards.name: Counsel in the White Tower
cards.quote: Even in a hall of stone, there is wisdom enough to prune a poor hand.
cards.actionEffect: Discard 1 card and draw 2.

cards.name: White Script of the Citadel
cards.quote: Old marks in old hands still know where to find the hidden road.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal an artifact site and draw 1 card.

cards.name: Wardens of the Rammas
cards.quote: The wall remembers every oath that was spoken for it.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal as unseen all hexes in radius 2 for 1 turn.

cards.name: Anfalas
cards.quote: Anfalas faces the sea with weathered hearts.

cards.name: Edhellond
cards.quote: The broken haven still hears the sea in its sleep.

cards.name: DreamsOfNumenor
cards.quote: Dreams of Numenor drift westward on the salt wind.
cards.actionEffect: All allied units on shore/water-adjacent tiles gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> and Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: FirstLightOnTheThirdDay
cards.quote: On the third day, the first light is the sweetest.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="freePeople"> Humans/Dunedain Encouraged and Hopeful; cavalry Hasted; mages slowed; armies +8% attack
<sprite name="darkServants"> emissaries gain Arcane Insight; in open Despaired; armies -12% attack
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Stand of Dol Amroth
cards.quote: Dol Amroth stands as the sea meets iron.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn).

cards.name: On the Pelennor
cards.quote: Upon the Pelennor the horn is answered by valor.
cards.actionEffect: The fields ring with hooves and steel. Target allied army commander here gains Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (2); cavalry <sprite name="ca"> also gains Haste <sprite name="haste">.

cards.name: Ithilien camp
cards.quote: Ithilien keeps its skill beneath leaf and shadow.
cards.actionEffect: The rangers melt into the shadow of Ithilien. All allied Dunedain in radius 5 gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Steward's Muster
cards.quote: At the Steward's muster, the people remember old duty.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Human units gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened">.

cards.name: Under Elendil's Banner
cards.quote: Elendil's banner is still a pledge to the Faithful.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Humans and Dunedain in radius 2 gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> and Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Druadan Forest
cards.quote: The hush of Druadan Forest is deep as root and as old as the first road through the dark.

cards.name: Paths of the Dead
cards.quote: The Paths of the Dead still feel the chill of unbreathed oaths, and no cheer lingers there.

cards.name: GhanBuriGhan
cards.quote: I am the voice of the wild; listen and you shall understand.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the nearest enemy settlement for 1 turn(s).

cards.name: Boromir
cards.quote: One does not simply abandon duty in the face of despair.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Eowyn
cards.quote: I am no man; I will stand against the darkness.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Gandalf the White
cards.quote: I have passed through fire and deep water. I come back to you now at the turn of the tide.
cards.actionEffect: Encourage <sprite name="encouraged"> all controlled characters for 3 turn(s).

cards.name: Attired for the Winelords
cards.quote: Adorned in finery, our spirits lift with the promise of gold.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn), and gain 2 gold.

cards.name: A Mithril coat
cards.quote: Mithril's light outlasts the pride of kings.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (3 turns).

cards.name: Raise the Inner Bastion
cards.quote: Stone laid upon stone is memory made useful against the dark.
cards.actionEffect: Increase the fort level of your PC in this hex by 1.

cards.name: Beregond
cards.quote: The guard who chooses his captain over his gate does not do so lightly.
cards.actionEffect: Upgrade fort <sprite name="fort"> on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Ioreth
cards.quote: Ioreth knows the old saying for every wound, and the older one for every sorrow.
cards.actionEffect: Heal a random controlled character by 30.

cards.name: Arwen
cards.quote: I would rather share one lifetime with you than face all the ages of this world alone.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Hope <sprite name="hope"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Hobbiton
cards.quote: The green of Hobbiton seems soft, yet it has a watchful heart.

cards.name: TheShire
cards.quote: The Shire endures by patience and many watchful hands.

cards.name: Imladris
cards.quote: In Imladris grief is borne as song, and not as burden.

cards.name: Rivendell
cards.quote: Rivendell keeps its own light when the East is dim.

cards.name: Eastfold
cards.quote: Eastfold lies open to wind and horse-track, and its fields remember riders before plowmen.

cards.name: Rohan
cards.quote: The land of horse-lords sings with the echoes of galloping hooves.

cards.name: Derndingle
cards.quote: Derndingle shelters the ancient wood with a silence that feels almost vowed.
